notes: The first service start failed before provider calls or SWE-bench execution due to an adaptive-pool rank-field mismatch. Commit 304d925 fixed the runner and the run restarted from the same frozen pool.
The accepted iter155 rows were produced before candidate exhaustion: processed 12 of the frozen 48 candidates and stopped at the registered target of 3 new rows.
All cloud resources created for the run were deleted before publication. No project identifiers or secrets are written in proof artifacts.
The result crosses the candidate benchmark-size bar only. A public v1 benchmark artifact still requires a separate release-manifest gate.
